Policy.name: Okta Account Management Policy
Policy.description: This policy defines how users must authenticate for authenticator enrollment, password reset, or unlock account. Password policy rules control whether to enforce this policy for password reset and unlock account.

Policy.name: Client Update Policy
Policy.description: Enables client update policy evaluation for the org.
